title.description: The full title of the research paper

affiliation.description: Institution or organization the author is affiliated with

authors.description: List of paper authors with their affiliations

abstract.description: The abstract or summary section of the paper

heading.description: Section heading or title (e.g., Introduction, Methods, Results)

content.description: Full text content of this section, preserving paragraph structure

sections.description: Main content sections of the paper, each with heading and full text

caption.description: The caption text describing the figure

figures.description: Figures and charts referenced in the paper

caption.description: The caption or title of the table

content.description: Textual representation of the table data

tables.description: Tables with their data and captions

key_findings.description: Main conclusions, findings, or contributions stated in the paper

references_count.description: Total number of references/citations in the bibliography

settings.system_prompt: You are extracting structured data from academic research papers. Preserve the logical structure of sections. For multi-column layouts, read content in proper reading order. Extract figure and table references with their captions. Capture all section headings and their complete text content.
